title: myriophyllum humile
intro: Myriophyllum humile, also known as dwarf water milfoil, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. The medicinal properties of M. humile can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. M. humile can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
